intentSynonyms: show me my sections in onenote
see all my sections in onenote
list sections in a notebook or across all notebooks in onenote
description: List OneNote sections. When a notebook_id is provided, returns only sections in that notebook. Otherwise returns all sections across all notebooks.

notebook_id.description: Notebook ID to list sections for. Omit to list all sections.

top.description: Maximum number of sections to return (default 20, max 100)
